summary: i18n Translation Coverage Testing - Tested language switching between English, Spanish, and Portuguese across Dashboard, Command Center, IAM, and Settings pages. Found that Dashboard and Command Center are well-translated, but IAM and Settings pages have significant hardcoded English strings.

i18n_issues.issue: Page has hardcoded English strings instead of translation keys
details: Line 547-549: Title 'Identity & Access Management' and subtitle are hardcoded
Line 554-559: Stats labels (Users, Teams, Specialties, Roles, Account Types, Plans) are hardcoded
Line 577: Search placeholder 'Search users...' is hardcoded
Line 580: 'Add User' button text is hardcoded
Line 588-594: Table headers (USER, ROLE, ACCOUNT TYPE, PLAN, SPECIALTY, STATUS, ACTIONS) are hardcoded

i18n_issues.issue: Page has hardcoded English strings instead of translation keys
details: Page title 'Settings' and subtitle are hardcoded

All card titles and descriptions are hardcoded (Dashboard Builder, System Documentation, Pool Picker Rules, Translation Editor, UI Customizations, Categories, Workflows, Email Settings, SLA & Escalation, Integrations)
Tip text at bottom is hardcoded
Subtitle 'What do you need help with today?' should use translation key
Empty state 'Select a category to continue' should use translation key
'Attach Files' label should use translation key

action_items: HIGH: Update IAMPage.js to use translation keys (t('iam.title'), t('iam.users'), etc.) instead of hardcoded English strings
HIGH: Update SettingsHub.js to use translation keys for all card titles, descriptions, and tip text
MEDIUM: Update CommandCenter.js to use translation keys for subtitle, empty state, and 'Attach Files' label
Verify all translation keys exist in en.json, es.json, and pt.json files
critical_code_review_comments: IAMPage.js (lines 547-650+): All UI text is hardcoded in English - needs full i18n refactor
SettingsHub.js: All card content is hardcoded - needs i18n keys
Translation files have correct keys for commandCenter but some keys may be missing for IAM and Settings

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Dashboard and Command Center mostly translated, IAM and Settings pages need work

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n testing completed. Dashboard and Command Center pages translate correctly when switching languages. Categories in dropdowns are translated. However, IAMPage.js and SettingsHub.js have hardcoded English strings that need to be replaced with translation keys. The language preference persists correctly in localStorage after switching.

i18n_test_results.language_switching: PASS - Language selector works, preference persists in localStorage

dashboard_translations.spanish: PASS - All KPIs, charts, sidebar, labels translated

command_center_translations.spanish: MOSTLY PASS - Form labels, placeholders, categories translated. Some minor strings still in English

i18n_test_results.category_translations: PASS - L1 and L2 categories display in selected language in dropdowns

iam_page_translations.spanish: FAIL - Page content is hardcoded in English
iam_page_translations.portuguese: FAIL - Page content is hardcoded in English

settings_page_translations.spanish: FAIL - Page content is hardcoded in English
settings_page_translations.portuguese: FAIL - Page content is hardcoded in English

i18n_test_results.sidebar_translations: PASS - Sidebar translates correctly in all languages
i18n_test_results.toast_messages: PASS - Toast messages translate (e.g., 'Bienvenido de Nuevo!' in Spanish)
